bio.Recent_Position: Product Marketing Intern at Western Digital in Milpitas, CA
bio.Bios: Hi! My name is Mohit Shah, and I initiated in my fall quarter of my first year here at UCI. In my free time I enjoy listening to podcasts and eating out with friends (pre-COVID-19). A fun fact about myself is that I wrote one of my UC essays about my left eyebrow. Ask me about my experiences with chocolate in elementary school and how I developed my passion for house hunting (more like viewing).
